answer.en: Follow the flow of karma

interpretation.zh: 一切有为法，如梦幻泡影。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: All conditioned things are like a dream, an illusion, a bubble, a shadow. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Release all attachments

interpretation.zh: 凡所有相，皆是虚妄。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: All appearances are illusory. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Let the heart be unburdened

interpretation.zh: 心无挂碍，无挂碍故，无有恐怖。——《心经》
interpretation.en: With no obscuration of mind, no fear exists. — Heart Sutra

answer.en: Observe quietly, let things unfold

interpretation.zh: 应无所住而生其心。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: One should give rise to a mind that dwells nowhere. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Karma does not deceive

interpretation.zh: 欲知前世因，今生受者是；欲知来世果，今生作者是。——《因果经》
interpretation.en: To know your past life, look at your present condition; to know your future, look at your present actions. — Sutra of Cause and Effect

answer.en: Let nature take its course

interpretation.zh: 法尔如是，本自天然。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: Things are as they are, natural and uncontrived. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: This very moment is enough

interpretation.zh: 过去心不可得，现在心不可得，未来心不可得。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: The past mind cannot be grasped, the present mind cannot be grasped, the future mind cannot be grasped. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Respond with compassion

interpretation.zh: 无缘大慈，同体大悲。——佛教谚语
interpretation.en: Universal compassion without conditions, shared sorrow as one body. — Buddhist Proverb

answer.en: All phenomena are empty

interpretation.zh: 色不异空，空不异色，色即是空，空即是色。——《心经》
interpretation.en: Form is not different from emptiness, emptiness is not different from form. — Heart Sutra

answer.en: Turn inward and reflect

interpretation.zh: 菩提本无树，明镜亦非台，本来无一物，何处惹尘埃。——六祖惠能
interpretation.en: Bodhi has no tree, the mirror has no stand; originally there is not a single thing, where could dust arise? — Huineng, Sixth Patriarch

answer.en: Patience is the highest virtue

interpretation.zh: 忍辱第一道，佛说无为最。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: Patience is the foremost practice; the Buddha taught that non-action is supreme. — Dhammapada

answer.en: Seek not outside yourself

interpretation.zh: 何期自性，本自具足。——六祖惠能
interpretation.en: Who would have thought that our inherent nature is itself complete and perfect? — Huineng, Sixth Patriarch

answer.en: Impermanence is the only constant

interpretation.zh: 诸行无常，是生灭法。——《涅槃经》
interpretation.en: All compounded things are impermanent, subject to arising and passing away. — Mahaparinirvana Sutra

answer.en: In stillness, reflect on your own faults

interpretation.zh: 静坐常思己过，闲谈莫论人非。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: In quiet sitting, reflect on your own faults; in idle talk, do not discuss others' wrongs. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Rejoice in the merit of others

interpretation.zh: 随喜功德，广大如法界。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: Rejoice in merit, as vast as the dharmadhatu. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: Take precepts as your guide

interpretation.zh: 以戒为师，依教奉行。——佛陀遗教
interpretation.en: Take the precepts as your teacher and practice accordingly. — Buddha's Last Instructions

answer.en: Do not forget your original aspiration

interpretation.zh: 不忘初心，方得始终。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: Only by not forgetting the original intention can one achieve the ultimate goal. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: When the flower opens, you will see the Buddha

interpretation.zh: 一花一世界，一叶一菩提。——佛教谚语
interpretation.en: One flower, one world; one leaf, one bodhi. — Buddhist Proverb

answer.en: All things have their season

interpretation.zh: 生者皆有灭，会者终必离。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: All that is born must perish; all that meets must part. — Dhammapada

answer.en: Let the mind be like still water

interpretation.zh: 心如工画师，能画诸世间。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: The mind is like a master painter, painting the entire world. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: You bear the fruits of your own karma

interpretation.zh: 善恶之报，如影随形。——《涅槃经》
interpretation.en: The reward of good and evil follows like a shadow. — Mahaparinirvana Sutra

answer.en: Contentment brings lasting joy

interpretation.zh: 知足之法，即是富乐安稳之处。——《遗教经》
interpretation.en: The way of contentment is the abode of wealth, happiness, and peace. — Sutra of Bequeathed Teachings

answer.zh: 行到水穷处，坐看云起时
answer.en: When you reach the end of the water, sit and watch the clouds rise

interpretation.zh: 行到水穷处，坐看云起时。——王维
interpretation.en: When paths end, sit quietly and watch clouds arise. — Wang Wei

answer.en: When conditions gather, things arise; when they scatter, things cease

interpretation.zh: 此有故彼有，此生故彼生，此无故彼无，此灭故彼灭。——《杂阿含经》
interpretation.en: When this exists, that exists; when this arises, that arises; when this ceases, that ceases. — Samyukta Agama

answer.en: Remain unmoved, abiding in suchness

interpretation.zh: 不取于相，如如不动。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: Do not grasp at appearances, remain unmoved in suchness. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Look upon all beings with eyes of compassion

interpretation.zh: 慈眼视众生，福聚海无量。——《观世音菩萨普门品》
interpretation.en: With compassionate eyes, look upon all beings; merit gathers as vast as the ocean. — Universal Gate Chapter

answer.en: Purify your own mind

interpretation.zh: 诸恶莫作，众善奉行，自净其意，是诸佛教。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: Do no evil, cultivate all good, purify your mind — this is the teaching of all Buddhas. — Dhammapada

answer.en: When water flows, the channel is formed naturally

interpretation.zh: 不假方便，自得心开。——《楞严经》
interpretation.en: Without relying on expedients, the mind opens naturally. — Surangama Sutra

answer.en: Harmony is the greatest treasure

interpretation.zh: 和合故不诤，不诤故无怨。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Harmony prevents conflict; without conflict, there is no resentment. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Awakening lies within yourself

interpretation.zh: 佛向性中作，莫向身外求。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: The Buddha is found within your own nature; do not seek outside yourself. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: Adapt like water, taking the shape of any vessel

interpretation.zh: 上善若水，水善利万物而不争。——《道德经》
interpretation.en: The highest good is like water; water benefits all things and does not compete. — Tao Te Ching

answer.en: Walk the path where compassion and wisdom meet

interpretation.zh: 大悲为根，大智为果。——《大智度论》
interpretation.en: Great compassion is the root; great wisdom is the fruit. — Maha Prajnaparamita Shastra

answer.en: Form and emptiness are not two

interpretation.zh: 受想行识，亦复如是。——《心经》
interpretation.en: Feeling, perception, mental formations, and consciousness are also thus. — Heart Sutra

answer.en: Wait quietly for the right conditions

interpretation.zh: 因缘和合，法乃得生。——《中论》
interpretation.en: When causes and conditions converge, phenomena arise. — Madhyamaka Shastra

answer.en: See through illusions and let go

interpretation.zh: 若见诸相非相，即见如来。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: If one sees all appearances as no-appearance, one sees the Tathagata. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Who is it that recites the Buddha's name?

interpretation.zh: 念佛是谁？参！——禅宗话头
interpretation.en: Who is reciting the Buddha's name? Investigate! — Zen Koan

answer.en: Empty of giver, receiver, and gift

interpretation.zh: 应如是布施，不住于相。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: One should give thus, without dwelling on appearances. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: The mind embraces the vast void

interpretation.zh: 心包太虚，量周沙界。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: The mind encompasses the vast void, its capacity extends to realms numberless as sand. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Use the illusory to cultivate the real

interpretation.zh: 借假修真，借幻修心。——佛教修行法要
interpretation.en: Use the illusory to cultivate the real; use the phantom to train the mind. — Buddhist Practice Essentials

answer.en: What the mind persistently holds will echo back

interpretation.zh: 一切唯心造。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: All things are created by the mind alone. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: Karma follows you like a shadow

interpretation.zh: 假使百千劫，所作业不亡，因缘会遇时，果报还自受。——《大宝积经》
interpretation.en: Even after hundreds of thousands of kalpas, karma does not perish; when conditions meet, the fruit is personally experienced. — Maha Ratnakuta Sutra

answer.en: True wisdom knows nothing, yet knows everything

interpretation.zh: 般若无知，无所不知。——僧肇《般若无知论》
interpretation.en: Prajna knows nothing, yet there is nothing it does not know. — Sengzhao, On Prajna Being Without Knowledge

answer.en: Guard speech, restrain the mind, commit no wrong with the body

interpretation.zh: 善护于口言，自净其志意。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: Well-guarded in speech, self-purified in intention. — Dhammapada

answer.en: Think neither good nor evil

interpretation.zh: 不思善，不思恶，正与么时，那个是明上座本来面目？——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: Not thinking of good, not thinking of evil — right at this moment, what is your original face? — Platform Sutra

answer.en: No-gate is the Dharma gate

interpretation.zh: 佛语心为宗，无门为法门。——《无门关》
interpretation.en: The Buddha's teaching takes mind as its essence; no-gate is the Dharma gate. — The Gateless Gate

answer.en: Treasure each encounter, for it will not recur

interpretation.zh: 如露亦如电，应作如是观。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: Like dew, like a flash of lightning — contemplate all things thus. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Transcend all suffering

interpretation.zh: 照见五蕴皆空，度一切苦厄。——《心经》
interpretation.en: By clearly seeing that the five aggregates are empty, one overcomes all suffering. — Heart Sutra

answer.en: Forget both self and other

interpretation.zh: 无我相、无人相、无众生相、无寿者相。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: No self, no person, no being, no life span. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Point directly at the human heart

interpretation.zh: 教外别传，不立文字，直指人心，见性成佛。——禅宗宗旨
interpretation.en: A special transmission outside scriptures; no dependence on words; direct pointing to mind; seeing nature and becoming Buddha. — Zen Principle

answer.en: Cut through afflictions with the sword of wisdom

interpretation.zh: 烦恼即菩提。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: Afflictions themselves are bodhi. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: Practice generosity always

interpretation.zh: 布施者得福，慈心者得乐。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: The generous gain merit; the compassionate find joy. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Neither arising nor ceasing

interpretation.zh: 不生不灭，不垢不净，不增不减。——《心经》
interpretation.en: Neither arising nor ceasing, neither defiled nor pure, neither increasing nor decreasing. — Heart Sutra

answer.en: Use each encounter to dissolve old karma

interpretation.zh: 随缘消旧业，更不造新殃。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Dissolve old karma according to conditions; create no new misfortune. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: The inner and outer worlds are one

interpretation.zh: 心如境界，即见如来。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: When the mind accords with the true state, one sees the Tathagata. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: When no worldly concerns weigh on your mind

interpretation.zh: 若无闲事挂心头，便是人间好时节。——无门慧开
interpretation.en: When no worldly cares hang upon the heart, every season is a good season. — Wumen Huikai

answer.en: Turn back and the shore is right there

interpretation.zh: 苦海无边，回头是岸。——佛教谚语
interpretation.en: The sea of suffering is boundless; turn back and the shore is at hand. — Buddhist Proverb

answer.en: Live in the world, but keep your heart in the Pure Land

interpretation.zh: 心净则国土净。——《维摩诘经》
interpretation.en: When the mind is pure, the land is pure. — Vimalakirti Sutra

answer.en: Rely on the Dharma, not on the person

interpretation.zh: 依法不依人，依义不依语，依智不依识，依了义不依不了义。——《涅槃经》
interpretation.en: Rely on the Dharma, not on the person; rely on meaning, not words; rely on wisdom, not consciousness; rely on definitive meaning, not provisional. — Mahaparinirvana Sutra

answer.en: Illuminate the mind and see your true nature

interpretation.zh: 何期自性，本自清净。——六祖惠能
interpretation.en: Who would have thought that our inherent nature is itself pure? — Huineng, Sixth Patriarch

answer.en: Use every circumstance to refine the mind

interpretation.zh: 是法住法位，世间相常住。——《法华经》
interpretation.en: Dharmas abide in their own positions; the characteristics of the world endure. — Lotus Sutra

answer.en: Lessen great matters, dissolve small ones

interpretation.zh: 烦恼本无根，不捡自然无。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Afflictions have no root; if you do not pick them up, they naturally disappear. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: A human life is hard to obtain; the Dharma is hard to hear

interpretation.zh: 人身难得今已得，佛法难闻今已闻。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: A human life is hard to gain and now it is gained; the Dharma is hard to hear and now it is heard. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: In the unconditioned Dharma, differences arise

interpretation.zh: 一切贤圣皆以无为法而有差别。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: All sages and worthies differ in their realization of the unconditioned Dharma. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Be filled with the joy of the Dharma

interpretation.zh: 闻法欢喜，信受奉行。——《法华经》
interpretation.en: Hearing the Dharma with joy, faithfully receiving and practicing it. — Lotus Sutra

answer.en: One pure thought is one thought of Buddha

interpretation.zh: 一念清净一念佛，念念清净念念佛。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: One pure thought is one Buddha-thought; every pure thought is a Buddha-thought. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Set down all worldly ties and focus the mind

interpretation.zh: 都摄六根，净念相继。——《大势至菩萨念佛圆通章》
interpretation.en: Gather the six sense faculties; let pure thoughts continue unbroken. — Great Strength Bodhisattva's Mindfulness Chapter

answer.en: In suffering do not grieve; in joy do not exult

interpretation.zh: 不悲不喜，不来不去。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Neither sad nor joyful, neither coming nor going. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: The Buddha saves those with karmic affinity

interpretation.zh: 佛度有缘人，药医不死病。——佛教谚语
interpretation.en: The Buddha guides those with affinity; medicine cures the curable. — Buddhist Proverb

answer.en: Temper the mind through life's experiences

interpretation.zh: 烦恼泥中，乃有众生起佛法。——《维摩诘经》
interpretation.en: From the mud of afflictions, beings give rise to the Buddhadharma. — Vimalakirti Sutra

answer.zh: 不为自己求安乐，但愿众生得离苦
answer.en: Seek not your own comfort, but the liberation of all beings

interpretation.zh: 不为自己求安乐，但愿众生得离苦。——菩萨大愿
interpretation.en: I seek not my own happiness, but only that all beings be freed from suffering. — Bodhisattva Vow

answer.en: The physical body is but an illusion

interpretation.zh: 如人梦中见种种事，寤已皆无。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Like a person seeing many things in a dream, upon waking all are gone. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Cultivate both merit and wisdom

interpretation.zh: 修福不修慧，大象挂璎珞；修慧不修福，罗汉托空钵。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Merit without wisdom is like an elephant wearing jewels; wisdom without merit is like an arhat with an empty bowl. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: The ordinary mind is the Way

interpretation.zh: 平常心是道。——赵州从谂
interpretation.en: The ordinary mind is the Way. — Zhaozhou Congshen

answer.en: Let the mind be like the open sky

interpretation.zh: 心如虚空，无所不容。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: The mind like open sky embraces everything. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: The Way is found in the most ordinary places

interpretation.zh: 道在屎溺。——庄子
interpretation.en: The Way is present even in excrement and urine. — Zhuangzi

answer.en: Go drink tea

interpretation.zh: 吃茶去。——赵州从谂
interpretation.en: Go drink tea. — Zhaozhou Congshen

answer.en: Each moment is a complete lifetime

interpretation.zh: 一念三千。——天台智者大师
interpretation.en: One thought contains three thousand realms. — Zhiyi, Tiantai Master

answer.en: Repay the four great debts of gratitude

interpretation.zh: 上报四重恩，下济三途苦。——佛教回向偈
interpretation.en: Above, repay the fourfold kindness; below, relieve the suffering of the three lower realms. — Buddhist Dedication Verse

answer.en: True emptiness, wondrous existence

interpretation.zh: 真空不空，妙有非有。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: True emptiness is not empty; wondrous existence is not existence. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.zh: 万般带不走，唯有业随身
answer.en: You can take nothing with you, only karma follows

interpretation.zh: 万般带不去，唯有业随身。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Nothing can be taken away; only karma follows the body. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Awaken to life's true meaning

interpretation.zh: 无上甚深微妙法，百千万劫难遭遇。——武则天《开经偈》
interpretation.en: The supreme, profound, and subtle Dharma is hard to encounter even in hundreds of thousands of kalpas. — Empress Wu's Opening Verse

answer.en: Yielding is the higher path

interpretation.zh: 退一步海阔天空，忍一时风平浪静。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Step back and the sky is boundless; endure a moment and the sea grows calm. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Be a lamp unto yourself; let the Dharma be your lamp

interpretation.zh: 自洲自依，法洲法依。——《长阿含经》
interpretation.en: Be an island unto yourself; take the Dharma as your island. — Digha Nikaya

answer.en: Use your mind skillfully

interpretation.zh: 善用其心，则获一切胜妙功德。——《净行品》
interpretation.en: Use the mind well, and you will attain all excellent and wondrous merits. — Chapter on Pure Conduct

answer.en: Do not obscure cause and effect

interpretation.zh: 不昧因果，落因果。——百丈怀海
interpretation.en: Do not be blind to cause and effect; one still falls within cause and effect. — Baizhang Huaihai

answer.en: The great Way is utterly simple

interpretation.zh: 道在日用处。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: The Way is found in daily life. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: To let go is enough

interpretation.zh: 放下屠刀，立地成佛。——佛教谚语
interpretation.en: Put down the butcher's knife and instantly become a Buddha. — Buddhist Proverb

answer.en: In deep stillness, the light of understanding shines through

interpretation.zh: 静极光通达，寂照含虚空。——《楞严经》
interpretation.en: In ultimate stillness, light permeates everywhere; silent illumination embraces the void. — Surangama Sutra

answer.en: All phenomena arise from causes and conditions

interpretation.zh: 诸法因缘生，诸法因缘灭。——《杂阿含经》
interpretation.en: All phenomena arise from causes and conditions; all phenomena cease through causes and conditions. — Samyukta Agama

answer.en: Let your vows guide your actions

interpretation.zh: 众生无边誓愿度，烦恼无尽誓愿断。——四弘誓愿
interpretation.en: Sentient beings are numberless, I vow to save them; afflictions are inexhaustible, I vow to end them. — Four Great Vows

answer.en: Pure and unconditioned

interpretation.zh: 法本法无法，无法法亦法。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: The Dharma is originally no-Dharma; no-Dharma is also Dharma. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Circumstances change according to the mind

interpretation.zh: 应观法界性，一切唯心造。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: One should observe the nature of the dharmadhatu: all is created by mind alone. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: Live fully in this moment

interpretation.zh: 生命只在呼吸间。——《四十二章经》
interpretation.en: Life exists only in the space between breaths. — Sutra of Forty-Two Sections

answer.en: One contains all; all is contained in one

interpretation.zh: 一即一切，一切即一。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: One is all; all is one. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: Bodhi is found only within the mind

interpretation.zh: 菩提只向心觅，何劳向外求玄？——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: Bodhi is found only by seeking within the mind; why toil seeking mysteries outside? — Platform Sutra

answer.zh: 一念嗔心起，百万障门开
answer.en: One thought of anger opens a million gates of obstruction

interpretation.zh: 一念嗔心起，百万障门开。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: One thought of anger opens a million gates of obstruction. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Always keep impermanence in mind

interpretation.zh: 是日已过，命亦随减。——《普贤警众偈》
interpretation.en: This day has passed; life has diminished accordingly. — Samantabhadra's Admonition Verse

answer.en: Even good things are best held lightly

interpretation.zh: 不求万事如意，但求如理如法。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Seek not that all things go your way; seek only to act in accordance with Dharma. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Like one who drinks water, only you know its temperature

interpretation.zh: 如人饮水，冷暖自知。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: Like drinking water — only the drinker knows whether it is warm or cold. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: Take having no troubles as prosperity

interpretation.zh: 以无事为兴盛，以忍耐为德行。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Consider absence of trouble as prosperity; regard patience as virtue. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Observe from a place of stillness

interpretation.zh: 观自在菩萨，行深般若波罗蜜多时。——《心经》
interpretation.en: When Avalokiteshvara Bodhisattva practiced the profound Prajnaparamita. — Heart Sutra

answer.en: Seek through precepts, concentration, and wisdom

interpretation.zh: 由戒生定，因定发慧。——《楞严经》
interpretation.en: From precepts arises concentration; from concentration, wisdom emerges. — Surangama Sutra

answer.en: Come and go in freedom

interpretation.zh: 来去自由，通用无滞。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: Coming and going in freedom, functioning without obstruction. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: Guard your thoughts with care

interpretation.zh: 如来善护念诸菩萨，善付嘱诸菩萨。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: The Tathagata well guards the thoughts of all bodhisattvas and well entrusts them. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Even the Dharma must be let go

interpretation.zh: 法尚应舍，何况非法。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: Even the Dharma should be relinquished — how much more so what is not Dharma. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Do not underestimate small acts of goodness

interpretation.zh: 莫轻小恶，以为无殃；水滴虽微，渐盈大器。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: Do not underestimate small evils, thinking they bring no harm; water drops though tiny, gradually fill a great vessel. — Dhammapada

answer.en: Let the mind not dwell on any thing

interpretation.zh: 菩萨于法，应无所住，行于布施。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: A bodhisattva should practice generosity without dwelling on anything. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Cut through doubt and give rise to faith

interpretation.zh: 信为道源功德母，长养一切诸善根。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: Faith is the source of the Way and mother of merit; it nurtures all roots of goodness. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: Contend not, covet not

interpretation.zh: 无诤三昧，人中最为第一。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: The samadhi of non-contention is the foremost among people. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Practice the six perfections together

interpretation.zh: 布施、持戒、忍辱、精进、禅定、般若。——《大般若经》
interpretation.en: Generosity, precepts, patience, diligence, concentration, and wisdom. — Maha Prajnaparamita Sutra

answer.en: Do not calculate gain and loss

interpretation.zh: 得不喜，失不忧，毁誉不动。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Neither joyful in gain nor sorrowful in loss; unmoved by praise or blame. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Dwell peacefully in the present

interpretation.zh: 不忆过去，不盼未来，安住现在。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Do not dwell on the past, do not long for the future; abide in the present. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Diligently cultivate precepts, concentration, and wisdom

interpretation.zh: 勤修戒定慧，息灭贪嗔痴。——佛教修行纲要
interpretation.en: Diligently cultivate precepts, concentration, and wisdom; extinguish greed, anger, and delusion. — Buddhist Practice Outline

answer.en: Turn away from deluded thinking

interpretation.zh: 远离颠倒梦想，究竟涅槃。——《心经》
interpretation.en: Far away from deluded thoughts and dreams, one attains ultimate nirvana. — Heart Sutra

answer.en: Speak rightly and act rightly

interpretation.zh: 正语、正业、正命。——八正道
interpretation.en: Right speech, right action, right livelihood. — The Noble Eightfold Path

answer.en: One flower opens with five petals

interpretation.zh: 一花开五叶，结果自然成。——达摩祖师
interpretation.en: One flower opens with five petals; the fruit will form naturally. — Bodhidharma

answer.en: The Dharma has no fixed form

interpretation.zh: 法无定法，然后知非法。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: The Dharma has no fixed form; only then can one understand what is not-Dharma. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Let compassion be your foundation

interpretation.zh: 慈悲为本，方便为门。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Compassion is the root; skillful means are the gate. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Do not let the mind dwell on appearances

interpretation.zh: 不应住色生心，不应住声香味触法生心。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: One should not dwell on form, sound, smell, taste, touch, or thought to give rise to the mind. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: You reap what you sow

interpretation.zh: 自作自受，共作共受。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: What you do yourself, you experience yourself; what is done together, is experienced together. — Dhammapada

answer.en: Achieve through patient endurance

interpretation.zh: 忍辱波罗蜜，如来说非忍辱波罗蜜。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: The paramita of patience — the Tathagata teaches it is not the paramita of patience. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Each thing abides in its own place

interpretation.zh: 诸法从本来，常自寂灭相。——《法华经》
interpretation.en: All phenomena from the beginning have always been in the state of stillness and extinction. — Lotus Sutra

answer.en: Purify the three actions of body, speech, and mind

interpretation.zh: 身口意三业清净，即是佛行。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: When body, speech, and mind are purified, that is the conduct of a Buddha. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: See your nature and become Buddha

interpretation.zh: 前念迷即众生，后念悟即佛。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: A single deluded thought makes one a sentient being; a single awakened thought makes one a Buddha. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: Engage with form yet be free from form

interpretation.zh: 于相而离相，于空而离空。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Engage with form yet transcend form; engage with emptiness yet transcend emptiness. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Endure with the insight of non-arising

interpretation.zh: 得无生法忍，住不退转地。——《法华经》
interpretation.en: Attaining the patience of non-arising, one dwells in the stage of non-retrogression. — Lotus Sutra

answer.en: Transform according to the needs of all beings

interpretation.zh: 应以何身得度者，即现何身而为说法。——《法华经·普门品》
interpretation.en: In whatever form beings can be saved, in that form the teaching appears. — Lotus Sutra, Universal Gate Chapter

answer.en: Desire little and be content

interpretation.zh: 少欲无为，身心自在。——《遗教经》
interpretation.en: With few desires and non-action, body and mind are at ease. — Sutra of Bequeathed Teachings

answer.en: The mind itself is Buddha

interpretation.zh: 即心即佛，非心非佛。——马祖道一
interpretation.en: The mind is Buddha; not-mind is not-Buddha. — Mazu Daoyi

answer.en: All dharmas return to the one

interpretation.zh: 万法归一，一归何处？——赵州从谂
interpretation.en: All dharmas return to the one — but where does the one return? — Zhaozhou Congshen

answer.en: Seek nothing

interpretation.zh: 求即不与，不求自来。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: What you seek does not come; what you do not seek arrives on its own. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Flowers bloom and fall in their own time

interpretation.zh: 春观百花开，秋睹黄叶落。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: In spring, observe the hundred flowers bloom; in autumn, watch the yellow leaves fall. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Cross over with the wisdom of prajna

interpretation.zh: 般若波罗蜜，即非般若波罗蜜。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: Prajnaparamita is not prajnaparamita. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Peace of mind is the greatest blessing

interpretation.zh: 心安茅屋稳，性定菜根香。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: With a peaceful heart, even a thatched hut is stable; with a steady nature, even vegetable roots are fragrant. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Neither grasp nor reject

interpretation.zh: 不取不舍，亦不染著。——《维摩诘经》
interpretation.en: Neither grasping nor rejecting, and also not defiled by attachment. — Vimalakirti Sutra

answer.en: Strive diligently without retreating

interpretation.zh: 如救头燃，慎勿放逸。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: As if your hair were on fire, be diligent and do not be careless. — Dhammapada

answer.en: The dharmadhatu is a single reality

interpretation.zh: 一相无相，即为实相。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: One mark and no mark — this is the true mark of reality. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Wrongdoing bears bitter fruit

interpretation.zh: 恶业未熟，愚夫谓乐；恶业既熟，方知是苦。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: Before evil karma ripens, the fool thinks it joy; once it ripens, suffering is known. — Dhammapada

answer.en: The mind neither increases nor decreases

interpretation.zh: 在圣不增，在凡不减。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: In the sage it does not increase; in the ordinary person it does not decrease. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Contemplate the impurity of the body

interpretation.zh: 观身不净，观受是苦，观心无常，观法无我。——四念处
interpretation.en: Contemplate the body as impure, feeling as suffering, mind as impermanent, and phenomena as non-self. — Four Foundations of Mindfulness

answer.en: Give without attachment to giver, receiver, or gift

interpretation.zh: 菩萨布施，不见施者，不见受者，不见施物。——《大般若经》
interpretation.en: A bodhisattva gives without seeing the giver, the receiver, or the gift. — Maha Prajnaparamita Sutra

answer.en: Walk the middle way

interpretation.zh: 离于二边，中说于中道。——《中论》
interpretation.en: Departing from the two extremes, one speaks of the middle way. — Madhyamaka Shastra

answer.en: Do not leave the world to find awakening

interpretation.zh: 佛法在世间，不离世间觉。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: The Buddhadharma is in the world; awakening is not apart from the world. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: Be fully aware in every thought

interpretation.zh: 善知心念，善调伏心。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: Know your thoughts well; tame your mind skillfully. — Dhammapada

answer.en: Cherish blessings and cultivate wisdom

interpretation.zh: 乐善好施，惜福培福。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Take joy in doing good and giving generously; cherish and cultivate your blessings. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Adapt to circumstances while remaining unchanged

interpretation.zh: 随缘不变，不变随缘。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Adapting to conditions without changing; unchanging yet adapting to conditions. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: No wisdom and no attainment

interpretation.zh: 无智亦无得，以无所得故。——《心经》
interpretation.en: No wisdom and no attainment — because there is nothing to attain. — Heart Sutra

answer.en: Enter the path through listening, thinking, and practicing

interpretation.zh: 由闻思修，入三摩地。——《楞严经》
interpretation.en: Through listening, contemplating, and practicing, one enters samadhi. — Surangama Sutra

answer.en: Do not fall into either extreme

interpretation.zh: 不执有，不执空，不执中。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Do not cling to existence, do not cling to emptiness, do not cling to the middle. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: All things are cause and effect

interpretation.zh: 如是因，如是果。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Such causes produce such effects. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Settle the mind and establish your purpose

interpretation.zh: 将心来，与汝安。——达摩祖师
interpretation.en: Bring me your mind, and I will pacify it for you. — Bodhidharma

answer.en: Awakening may come in an instant

interpretation.zh: 迷闻经累劫，悟则刹那间。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: Deluded, one wanders for countless kalpas; awakened, in but a single instant. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: Form good connections widely

interpretation.zh: 未成佛道，先结人缘。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Before attaining Buddhahood, first form karmic connections with others. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Simply do what is good

interpretation.zh: 但行好事，莫问前程。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Only do good deeds; do not ask about the future. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: The nature of all things is emptiness

interpretation.zh: 是故空中无色，无受想行识。——《心经》
interpretation.en: Therefore in emptiness there is no form, no feeling, perception, mental formation, or consciousness. — Heart Sutra

answer.en: Prescribe the medicine suited to the illness

interpretation.zh: 应病与药，随机说法。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Give medicine according to the illness; teach the Dharma according to the listener's capacity. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Let the mind remain untainted

interpretation.zh: 百花丛里过，片叶不沾身。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Passing through a field of flowers, not a single petal clings to the body. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Cease evil and practice good

interpretation.zh: 诸恶莫作，众善奉行。——《法句经》
interpretation.en: Refrain from all evil; practice all that is good. — Dhammapada

answer.en: See things as they truly are

interpretation.zh: 如实知自心。——《大日经》
interpretation.en: Know your own mind as it truly is. — Mahavairocana Sutra

answer.en: Goodness grows like grass in a spring garden

interpretation.zh: 行善如春园之草，不见其长，日有所增。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Doing good is like grass in a spring garden — its growth is unseen but increases daily. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Do not cling to any single teaching

interpretation.zh: 知我说法，如筏喻者，法尚应舍。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: Understand my teaching as like a raft — even the Dharma should be let go. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Merit beyond measure

interpretation.zh: 若有善男子善女人，以七宝满尔所恒河沙数三千大千世界以用布施，得福甚多。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: If a good person filled countless worlds with the seven treasures and gave them all away, the merit would be immeasurable. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Mind, Buddha, and sentient beings are not different

interpretation.zh: 心佛及众生，是三无差别。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: Mind, Buddha, and sentient beings — these three are without difference. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: Grinding a brick to make a mirror

interpretation.zh: 磨砖岂能成镜？坐禅岂能成佛？——南岳怀让
interpretation.en: Can grinding a brick make a mirror? Can sitting in meditation make a Buddha? — Nanyue Huairang

answer.en: Do not give rise to afflictions

interpretation.zh: 若无我见，何生烦恼？——《中论》
interpretation.en: If there is no view of self, how can afflictions arise? — Madhyamaka Shastra

answer.en: With a compassionate heart, harm no life

interpretation.zh: 一切众生皆有佛性，不可杀害。——《涅槃经》
interpretation.en: All sentient beings possess Buddha-nature; they must not be killed. — Mahaparinirvana Sutra

answer.en: Sit quietly and observe the mind

interpretation.zh: 若能观心，究竟解脱。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: If you can observe the mind, you will ultimately attain liberation. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Cultivate the four immeasurable minds

interpretation.zh: 慈、悲、喜、舍，名曰四无量心。——《俱舍论》
interpretation.en: Loving-kindness, compassion, sympathetic joy, and equanimity are called the four immeasurable minds. — Abhidharmakosa

answer.en: Originally, you are already Buddha

interpretation.zh: 何期自性，能生万法。——六祖惠能
interpretation.en: Who would have thought that our inherent nature can give rise to all phenomena? — Huineng, Sixth Patriarch

answer.en: Practice free from the four notions

interpretation.zh: 离一切相，即名诸佛。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: To be free from all appearances is to be called a Buddha. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: All phenomena are but consciousness

interpretation.zh: 三界唯心，万法唯识。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: The three realms are mind-only; all phenomena are consciousness-only. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: Let the mind be like a clear mirror

interpretation.zh: 身是菩提树，心如明镜台，时时勤拂拭，勿使惹尘埃。——神秀
interpretation.en: The body is the bodhi tree, the mind like a bright mirror stand; diligently wipe it clean at all times, do not let dust gather. — Shenxiu

answer.en: Patience itself is wisdom

interpretation.zh: 能行忍者，乃名为上。——《法华经》
interpretation.en: Those who can practice patience are called supreme. — Lotus Sutra

answer.en: Karma spans across three lifetimes

interpretation.zh: 欲知前世因，今生受者是。——《因果经》
interpretation.en: To know the causes of your past life, look at what you experience now. — Sutra of Cause and Effect

answer.en: Use the Dharma as medicine

interpretation.zh: 佛为医王，法为良药。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: The Buddha is the king of physicians; the Dharma is the excellent medicine. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Neither resent nor crave

interpretation.zh: 于顺境不喜，于逆境不忧。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: In favorable circumstances do not rejoice; in adversity do not grieve. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: As soon as a thought arises, be aware of it

interpretation.zh: 念起即觉，觉之即无。——佛教修行法要
interpretation.en: As a thought arises, be aware of it; once aware, it dissolves. — Buddhist Practice Essentials

answer.en: Let the mind be undistracted

interpretation.zh: 制心一处，无事不办。——《遗教经》
interpretation.en: Focus the mind on one point, and nothing is impossible to accomplish. — Sutra of Bequeathed Teachings

answer.en: Remain unmoved by the eight worldly winds

interpretation.zh: 八风吹不动，端坐紫金莲。——苏东坡
interpretation.en: Unmoved by the eight winds, sitting upright on the golden lotus. — Su Dongpo

answer.en: Comprehend the nature of birth and death

interpretation.zh: 生死即涅槃，烦恼即菩提。——《维摩诘经》
interpretation.en: Birth and death are themselves nirvana; afflictions are themselves bodhi. — Vimalakirti Sutra

answer.en: With compassion, there are no enemies

interpretation.zh: 以慈息嗔，以悲息害。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: With loving-kindness, anger subsides; with compassion, harm ceases. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: The Way is not far from human life

interpretation.zh: 道在日用之间。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: The Way is found in the space of daily life. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: See the true nature of all phenomena

interpretation.zh: 唯佛与佛乃能究尽诸法实相。——《法华经》
interpretation.en: Only a Buddha together with a Buddha can exhaustively realize the true aspect of all phenomena. — Lotus Sutra

answer.en: Establish all practices in non-abiding

interpretation.zh: 以无住为本，立一切法。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: Taking non-abiding as the foundation, establish all practices. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: Neither identical nor separate

interpretation.zh: 不即不离，无住无著。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Neither identical nor separate, neither dwelling nor grasping. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Cultivate the field of merit with the heart

interpretation.zh: 悲田、敬田、恩田，名三福田。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: The field of compassion, the field of reverence, and the field of gratitude are called the three fields of merit. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: When the mind stirs, all phenomena arise

interpretation.zh: 心生则种种法生，心灭则种种法灭。——《大乘起信论》
interpretation.en: When the mind arises, all phenomena arise; when the mind ceases, all phenomena cease. — Awakening of Faith in Mahayana

answer.en: Do not contend, do not seek

interpretation.zh: 无求便是安心法，不饱真为祛病方。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Non-seeking is the way to peace of mind; moderation is the true prescription for health. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Karma is never lost

interpretation.zh: 纵使百千劫，所作业不亡。——《大宝积经》
interpretation.en: Even after a hundred thousand kalpas, the karma created does not vanish. — Maha Ratnakuta Sutra

answer.en: Transmit from mind to mind

interpretation.zh: 以心传心，皆令自悟自解。——《六祖坛经》
interpretation.en: Transmit from mind to mind, enabling all to awaken and liberate themselves. — Platform Sutra

answer.en: Care for yourself with diligence

interpretation.zh: 善自护念，善自调伏。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Guard your thoughts well; tame yourself well. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: All conditioned things are like morning dew

interpretation.zh: 一切有为法，如星翳灯幻，露泡梦电云，应作如是观。——《金刚经》
interpretation.en: All conditioned things are like stars, cataracts, lamps, illusions, dew, bubbles, dreams, lightning, and clouds — contemplate them thus. — Diamond Sutra

answer.en: Turn around and observe deeply

interpretation.zh: 返闻闻自性，性成无上道。——《楞严经》
interpretation.en: Turn hearing inward to hear your own nature; your nature accomplishes the unsurpassed way. — Surangama Sutra

answer.en: No good deed is ever in vain

interpretation.zh: 功不唐捐，福不虚施。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Effort is never wasted; merit is never given in vain. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Contemplate dependent origination and emptiness

interpretation.zh: 众因缘生法，我说即是空。——《中论》
interpretation.en: All phenomena born of causes and conditions — I say they are empty. — Madhyamaka Shastra

answer.en: Keep your original aspiration and Buddhahood is assured

interpretation.zh: 初发心时便成正觉。——《华严经》
interpretation.en: At the very moment of generating the initial aspiration, one attains awakening. — Avatamsaka Sutra

answer.en: One thought creates heaven; one thought creates hell

interpretation.zh: 一念清净，即佛境界；一念染污，即众生境界。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: One pure thought is the realm of Buddhas; one defiled thought is the realm of sentient beings. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: Understand others with a kind heart

interpretation.zh: 善解方便，安乐众生。——《法华经》
interpretation.en: Skillfully employing expedient means to bring peace and joy to all beings. — Lotus Sutra

answer.en: Entertain no evil thoughts

interpretation.zh: 意不存恶，口不言非，身不行恶。——佛教格言
interpretation.en: Harbor no evil in the mind, speak no wrong with the mouth, commit no evil with the body. — Buddhist Maxim

answer.en: All things return to stillness

interpretation.zh: 法性本来空寂，无生亦无灭。——《大般涅槃经》
interpretation.en: The nature of all things is originally empty and still, with neither arising nor ceasing. — Mahaparinirvana Sutra
